description: Sent iMessage test to David's email (david.ohara@improving.com) instead of his phone number (214.317.9659). iMessage to email doesn't trigger phone notifications reliably.
correction: iMessages to David must be sent to his cell number 214.317.9659, not his email address.
systemic_fix: David's iMessage recipient is always 2143179659. Store this as the default for all iMessage sends.
